sources.title: Live AI original coaching contrast set v1
intendedUse: Runtime retrieval of original good-versus-weak response pairs
Evaluation of response clarity, credibility, empathy, and next-step quality
cautions: Examples are fictional and must never be treated as facts about the owner
Policy, coverage, price, credential, and outcome claims require verified session context
sources.metadataSource: Repository license and locally authored data

sources.title: nvidia/HelpSteer2
intendedUse: Offline evaluation of helpfulness, correctness, coherence, complexity, and verbosity
Quarantined preference-pair review with row-level attribution
cautions: Not domain-specific coaching data
The pinned 9,125-row snapshot was audited; only five short, strong, communication-focused rows passed automatic quarantine filters
Relative preference does not establish factual correctness, compliance, or live-coaching quality
Import requires attribution preservation, independent content review, and content/safety filtering
No rows are bundled in this repository
sources.metadataSource: Hugging Face Hub connector dataset card metadata

sources.title: bitext/Bitext-customer-support-llm-chatbot-training-dataset
cautions: Sharing-license obligations must be reviewed before copying or transforming rows
Hybrid synthetic source still requires quality, bias, and unsafe-language filtering
No rows are bundled in this repository
sources.metadataSource: Hugging Face Hub connector dataset card metadata

sources.title: PolyAI/banking77
cautions: Contains customer queries rather than recommended agent responses
Banking intents do not authorize financial advice or claims
Import requires attribution; no rows are bundled in this repository

sources.title: Console-AI/IT-helpdesk-synthetic-tickets
cautions: The dataset card declares MIT but provides almost no creation, schema, bias, or quality documentation
License tag alone is not sufficient for ingestion
No rows are bundled in this repository

sources.title: ali-alkhars/interviews
cautions: The Hub card aggregates multiple upstream repositories and a Kaggle source without declaring a dataset license
Do not ingest unless every upstream item and transformation is cleared
No rows are bundled in this repository
sources.metadataSource: Hugging Face Hub connector dataset card metadata

sources.title: to-be/annomi-motivational-interviewing-therapy-conversations
sources.license: OpenRAIL tag; exact terms require source review
cautions: Contains sensitive therapy and substance-use conversation material
The Hub repository is a transformed copy; source and transformation rights must both be reviewed
Clinical motivational interviewing is not interchangeable with professional-performance coaching
No rows are bundled in this repository
sources.metadataSource: Hugging Face Hub connector dataset card metadata

sources.title: IWSLT/ted_talks_iwslt
sources.license: No clear reusable license declared in Hub metadata
cautions: Talk transcripts are copyrighted expressive works and the Hub card describes redistribution of TED content
Do not copy, fine-tune on, or imitate talk transcripts without a separately verified license
Use newly authored examples of general speaking principles instead
No rows are bundled in this repository

sources.title: distil-whisper/tedlium
cautions: Noncommercial and no-derivatives restrictions conflict with this corpus transformation workflow
Audio and transcripts are unnecessary for response coaching
